stanzas:
indha paava piraviyin
kanneer gangaiyai
ingae yaar arivaar

Naetru varai sooriynai
nenjil karpanai seidhen
adhu yaedho endrenni konden

indru vandha sooriyanai
ezhai kudisaiyil kanden
endhan yezhisaiyai alli thanthen

eppozhudhu eppozhudhu
undhan mugathinai paarpen
adhil enthan mugathinai parpen

enna seidhu enna seidhu
indha kadan naan theerppen
patta nandri kadangalai theerpen

kangal illai paarvai undu
kandukonden.
umai nenjum pesukindra
vaarthaiyai kaettene.

indha paava piraviyin
kanneer gangaiyai
ingae yaar arivaar

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Punniyam Thedi?

The song conveys a deep sense of devotion and the search for purity, reflecting the spiritual themes of the movie Kasi.

What is the plot context of the movie Kasi?

The movie revolves around themes of spirituality and redemption, highlighting the journey of a man seeking solace in the holy city of Kasi.

Who is the singer of Punniyam Thedi?

The song is sung by the talented artist Hariharan, known for his soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for Punniyam Thedi?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, renowned for his innovative and timeless compositions.

When was Punniyam Thedi released?

The song was released on February 1, 2002, as part of the movie Kasi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Punniyam Thedi, the protagonist's quest for spiritual purity is beautifully articulated through the soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics. The song encapsulates the essence of devotion, evoking a sense of longing and introspection. Set against the backdrop of the holy city of Kasi, it resonates with anyone seeking solace and meaning in their life. Hariharan's soulful rendition, combined with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, makes this song a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Punniyam Thedi from the Kasi soundtrack is a mesmerizing blend of Hariharan's soulful vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting composition. This song beautifully captures the essence of devotion and longing, making it a timeless piece. Experience the spiritual journey through its heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody.
stanzaMeanings: Searching for goodness, they will go to Kasi in our land.
Who will come searching for this Kasi in this world?
The holy Ganges, which is pure, is known to everyone who is suffering.
Who knows about the tears of this unfortunate birth, the Ganges is here.
Devotees searching for God gather to build a temple.
In a song, searching for the madman, God has come.
Searching for goodness, they will go to Kasi in our land.
Who will come searching for this Kasi in this world?
Until yesterday, I had dreams of the sun in my heart, I thought it was something.
Today, I saw the sun in a humble dwelling, I gave my voice to it.
In the temple of melody, the need for the nation is to overcome suffering.
Today, I found salt in tears, you gave me the changes.
Goodness...
Whenever, whenever I see your face, I see my own face in it.
What should I do, what should I do, I will overcome this debt, I will overcome the walls of gratitude.
No matter how many births come, the truth will not change, even if said in the land.
I found that there are no eyes, I heard the words that your heart speaks.
Searching for goodness, they will go to Kasi in our land.
Who will come searching for this Kasi in this world?
